2.0: A heavy, suffocating air filled the dimly lit room.
2.2: The man lay weakly on the bed,<LINE>the fabric covering him trembling with his <LINE>shallow breaths, as if it might stop moving <LINE>at any moment.
2.3: Even as a naive boy,<LINE>I instinctively sensed from that frail body <LINE>and pale face that this was what it looked like <LINE>when a life was about to burn out.
2.4: "You’ll probably have a tough time after this..."
2.5: His voice was hoarse and weak, each word sounding <LINE>like it drained what little life he had left,<LINE>painfully forced out of his throat.
2.6: "I know this isn’t something a father should say...  \w[30]<LINE>but I still hope you can promise me—"
2.8: I stood there in a daze, <LINE>unable to process this sudden final message, <LINE>my mind completely blank.
2.9: Ah... these were important words, <LINE>and yet I couldn’t focus at all<LINE>I could only stare blankly at my father's face <LINE>as the light slowly left it.
2.10: "…Please take care of her,  \w[30]<LINE>from now on, treat her as your ○○—
2.11: His voice faded like smoke in the wind, <LINE>too faint to finish his final words. <LINE>He slowly turned his head toward <LINE>a shadowed corner of the room.
2.12: That corner was shrouded in heavy shadows,<LINE>as if it concealed something of great importance.
2.13: This man, who was both my father and my master,<LINE>took his last breath just like that.<LINE>His eyes remained open, <LINE>but the light of life had already left them.
2.14: Unconsciously, my eyes followed his gaze as well,<LINE>looking toward that mysterious corner—————
